title: Jinja2 Template Tests
content:
This file defines the built-in template tests used with Jinja2's `is` operator. These tests allow for conditional logic within templates based on the properties of variables.

### Key Exports:

-   **`test_odd(value: int) -> bool`**: Checks if an integer is odd.
-   **`test_even(value: int) -> bool`**: Checks if an integer is even.
-   **`test_divisibleby(value: int, num: int) -> bool`**: Checks if an integer is divisible by another integer.
-   **`test_defined(value: t.Any) -> bool`**: Checks if a variable is defined (not `Undefined`).
-   **`test_undefined(value: t.Any) -> bool`**: Checks if a variable is undefined.
-   **`test_filter(env: "Environment", value: str) -> bool`**: Checks if a filter exists by name.
-   **`test_test(env: "Environment", value: str) -> bool`**: Checks if a test exists by name.
-   **`test_none(value: t.Any) -> bool`**: Checks if a value is `None`.
-   **`test_boolean(value: t.Any) -> bool`**: Checks if a value is a boolean (`True` or `False`).
-   **`test_false(value: t.Any) -> bool`**: Checks if a value is `False`.
-   **`test_true(value: t.Any) -> bool`**: Checks if a value is `True`.
-   **`test_integer(value: t.Any) -> bool`**: Checks if a value is an integer (excluding booleans).
-   **`test_float(value: t.Any) -> bool`**: Checks if a value is a float.
-   **`test_lower(value: str) -> bool`**: Checks if a string is entirely in lowercase.
-   **`test_upper(value: str) -> bool`**: Checks if a string is entirely in uppercase.
-   **`test_string(value: t.Any) -> bool`**: Checks if a value is a string.
-   **`test_mapping(value: t.Any) -> bool`**: Checks if a value is a mapping (like a dictionary).
-   **`test_number(value: t.Any) -> bool`**: Checks if a value is a number (integer, float, etc.).
-   **`test_sequence(value: t.Any) -> bool`**: Checks if a value is a sequence (supports `len` and `__getitem__`).
-   **`test_sameas(value: t.Any, other: t.Any) -> bool`**: Checks if two objects are the same instance in memory.
-   **`test_iterable(value: t.Any) -> bool`**: Checks if a value is iterable.
-   **`test_escaped(value: t.Any) -> bool`**: Checks if a value has an `__html__` attribute (indicating it's escaped).
-   **`test_in(value: t.Any, seq: t.Container) -> bool`**: Checks if a value is present within a container.
-   **Comparison operators**: Includes `==`, `!=`, `>`, `>=`, `<`, `<=`, and their aliased forms like `eq`, `ne`, `gt`, etc.

### Usage Example:

```jinja
{% if my_variable is defined %}
    {{ my_variable }}
{% else %}
    Default Value
{% endif %}

{% if count is divisibleby 3 %}
    Count is a multiple of 3.
{% endif %}

{% if user_input is string %}
    User input is a string.
{% endif %}
```

-   **`test_sameas(value: t.Any, other: t.Any) -> bool`**: Checks if two objects are the same instance in memory.
